evals.prompt: POST /api/credits/transfer 엔드포인트 통합 테스트 작성해줘. NestJS + MikroORM 환경. 동시성 시나리오도 포함.
evals.expected_output: Justifies integration level (real DB needed for transactional/concurrency behavior). Writes integration test using project's test infrastructure. Includes concurrent transfer race condition test. Test runs red first (broken impl) before green. Test does not mock the DB.

evals.prompt: 신규 결제 플로우 e2e 테스트 작성해줘. 사용자가 상품 추가→장바구니→결제→확인까지. playwright로.
evals.expected_output: Identifies e2e level (multi-step user flow). Uses Playwright MCP (or authored Playwright Test file) with role-based selectors, browser_wait_for instead of sleep, captures diagnostics on failure. Single flow per test (not mega-test). Tests the contract (UI behavior + final state) not internal logs.

evals.prompt: 이 함수에 e2e 테스트 추가해줘: src/utils/formatCurrency.ts (입력값 받아서 KRW 형식 문자열 반환).
evals.expected_output: Pushes back on the test level — formatCurrency is a pure function, e2e test would be wasteful. Recommends unit test instead, citing decision tree. Optionally writes the unit test as the correct alternative.
